"[2] WHI KIA STOPPED ON BARSTOW RD "
"[11] [Notification] [CHP]-PARENTS REQ 1141 BE SENT TO HIGH SCHOOL 15620 JOSHUA RD - INFO PER VALERIE OFFICE ASSISTANT - 760-246-3909 EXT 39100"
"[4] SO REQ'D TO ROLL AS WELL FOR BORDER "
"[2] WHI MERZ VS JUVE ON A BICYCLE "
"[1] WHI SEMI MECHANICAL ISSUE W/ L/STEER TIRE"
"[60] 114-095 98 ENRT TO OFC, #1 LN CLOSED and CT 1097 // LOADING TRLR"
"[59] 114-44 CT HAS # 1 LN CLOSED UNK ETA FOR THE 1185 UNLOAD TRLR "
"[39] 114-40 WILL BE 1098 and ENRT TO CRMC FOR FOLLOW UP // 114-95 and 114-44 WILL REMAIN - 1185 HAS TRLR FULLY IN MEDIAN"
"[32] [Rotation Request Comment] 1039 ACTIVE TOWING (760) 326-4068 SUPER DUTY [Shared]"
"[31] B114-040 1185 ROT HEAVY DUTY TRACTOR TRLR COMBINATION// VEH ON ITS DRIVER SIDE STILL REQ 1141 [Shared]"
"[28] 44 REQ CALTRANS FOR POSS SHOULDER CLOSURE [Shared]"
"[1] CRETE SEMI O/T'D IN CD TL 1125 #1 LANE"
"[1] STRONG WINDS TA HIGH PROFILE VEHS"
"[6] 59-R20 #2 LANE WILL BE SHUT DOWN WB JWO 202 TO BROOME "
